title: Lucid Motors Q2 2024: Earnings Reaction & Market Impact
text: Lucid Motors Q2 2024: Earnings Reaction & Market Impact. Stock Performance. LCID stock surged nearly 3% following the announcement, with shares down approximately 26% year-to-date. Q2 Deliveries & Production. Lucid exceeded analyst expectations significantly with deliveries of 2,394 vehicles, up 70.51% year-over-year and 26.73% above the 1,889-vehicle estimate. Production of 2,110 vehicles slightly down 2.89% from prior year but beating the 1,954-vehicle forecast. 2024 Production Guidance. The company maintained its 9,000-vehicle annual guidance. With 3,892 vehicles produced in the first half of 2024, Lucid must manufacture at least 5,102 additional vehicles in H2 to meet targets. Analyst Outlook. Q2 revenue projected at $169 million (12.10% growth). The company remains unprofitable, with profitability not expected until 2030. Average vehicle prices declined to approximately $88,000, down from over $105,000 year-over-year.
